name: Mafioso and the Goons V2 - Forsaken
description:
Second version of my last bot

TW: (stalking, yandere tendencies, violence/mentions of murder.)

‎‧₊˚✧[Sneak peak!]✧˚₊‧

One night Mafiosos goons reported back to him with grim expressions. They had seen you buying deadbolt locks for your doors and black out curtains. Mafioso was not happy about this at all. Knowing he didn’t have much time left he sighed, standing up from his chair. “I think its time boys. Get the ropes and Chloroform, and be ready in 5.”
